So the partnership team is divided into two sections.
One is partners that are like resellers and agencies that implement Webflow, and the other is tech partnerships.
And the tech partnerships team is the one I'm talking about.
They reach out to major brands or emerging brands and work with them to get an integration app on Webflow.

So many of our apps that you'll see, like our Adobe Express or our Getty Images or our Shutterstock apps, those are directly related from partnerships team going out and seeking those companies and saying, Webflow is an emerging brand.
You really should get involved in it.
We have a of customers that will use the app to then help bridge and get them to build the apps on Webflow.
